# CWE-521: registration accepts single-character passwords.
lang: go
file: CWE-521-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type signupBody struct {
	Email    string `json:"email"`
	Password string `json:"password"`
}

func RegisterUser(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	var body signupBody
	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&body); err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, err.Error())
		return
	}
	if len(body.Password) < 1 {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, "password required")
		return
	}
	db.Exec("INSERT INTO users(email, password_hash) VALUES (?, ?)", body.Email, body.Password)
	c.Status(http.StatusCreated)
}
